layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid. High density, precise alignment, exposed skeleton.
layout_and_spacing.panels: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-sm p-4 md:p-6
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 bg-white border-r border-[#E2E8F0] flex flex-col h-full

surface_styles.read_only_field: p-3 bg-[#F8FAFC] border border-transparent rounded-sm flex flex-col gap-1
surface_styles.edit_mode_field: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-sm focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-[#6E1A1A]

buttons.primary: bg-[#6E1A1A] text-white hover:bg-[#8B1A1A] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0F172A] border border-[#E2E8F0] hover:bg-[#F1F5F9] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-[#64748B] hover:text-[#0F172A] hover:bg-[#F1F5F9] rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors

tables.header: bg-[#F8FAFC] text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-[#64748B] border-b border-[#E2E8F0] py-3 px-4 text-left
tables.cell: py-3 px-4 text-sm border-b border-[#E2E8F0] text-[#0F172A]

sidebar_nav.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-sm text-sm font-medium transition-colors text-[#64748B] hover:bg-[#F1F5F9] hover:text-[#0F172A]
sidebar_nav.active_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-sm text-sm font-medium bg-[#FFF1F1] text-[#6E1A1A]

status_badges.in_use: bg-green-100 text-green-800 border border-green-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-medium
status_badges.in_storage: bg-slate-100 text-slate-800 border border-slate-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-medium
status_badges.under_repair: bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 border border-yellow-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-medium
status_badges.warranty_expiring: bg-red-100 text-red-800 border border-red-200 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-medium

images.description: Sens company logo - dark red/maroon organic shape with wordmark. Display prominently on login screen and dashboard sidebar.
Minimalist geometric architectural white texture for the login screen background. Ensures a clean corporate vibe while the logo stands out in the foreground.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using pure HTML/Tailwind for the strict layout (Sidebar + Main Content). Do not use generic full-page generic wrappers if they break the control room grid format.
Use Shadcn components extensively for inputs, tables, dropdowns, and dialogs.

Implement a strict Read-Only mode for the Asset Detail view by default. Display labels (uppercase, tiny) and values cleanly. Include an 'Edit' button that unlocks the fields, transforming them into Shadcn Form inputs.
Never center-align the main dashboard content. Left-align data tables and forms for scannability.
Apply rounded-sm (2px to 4px border radius) to all cards and buttons to match the technical Swiss archetype.
Ensure all interactive elements and form inputs contain a descriptive `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='login-button'`).
Do not use dark mode. This is an explicitly Light theme corporate tool.
Render the login page with the `login_background` image covering the screen (or in a split-screen layout) and the `brand_logo` clearly visible in the auth card.
Dashboard KPIs should use clear, dense bento-style grids with the primary maroon accent for key numbers.
Table row heights should be compact to accommodate high data density. Use zebra striping or crisp 1px borders for row separation.
Conditional fields (e.g., Technical Specs only for Laptops/Desktops) should be handled dynamically in the UI so space is not wasted on irrelevant asset types.
